message:
feat: add GPU/Metal tiered dispatch for batch vector operations

- Add Metal GPU kernels for batch_dot_product, batch_cosine_sim, batch_l2_distance
- Create vector_ops.zig with tiered dispatch (SIMD <10K, GPU >=10K)
- Update logic_table_mod.zig batch functions to use runtime.metal
- Export batch ops from metal.zig

Tiered dispatch automatically selects:
- CPU SIMD: batch size < 10,000 (lower overhead)
- Metal GPU: batch size >= 10,000 (higher throughput)
